summary.title: New Threat Model
summary.description:
A rich oligarch has hired you as an external contractor to help design and secure the Privacy-
Enhanced Resort and Vacancy Online system that will be used to manage the bookings and logistics
of a luxury resort on a small, private island in the United States Virgin Islands. The resort is
frequently visited by celebrities, politicians, royal family members and other very rich and important
people from all over the world. The oligarch wants to guarantee discretion for all of the guests, who
often register under pseudonyms in the system. Still, it is necessary to keep accurate guest
information in order to manage billing, as well as keeping track of food preferences, personal
requests and special room services. Furthermore, it is important to manage surveillance data from
the resort premises to detect unwanted intruders. In order to do this, AI-based facial recognition
should be used to map people in video recordings with legit guests and staff members in the system.
Make your own assumptions about how the system should be implemented. You can assume that
the system will be deployed in the US and that there must at least be one database somewhere
storing guest information, one pseudonymised database and one media database. An external
identity service should be used for authentication
